tasks.label: BuddyBot: Full Hardware Audit
tasks.command: arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:mega BuddyBot_Mega_V29.ino && arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:renesas_uno:unor4wifi BuddyBot_R4_Dash.ino && arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:uno BuddyBot_R3_Motors.ino
tasks.detail: Compiles all 3 Arduino boards to catch logic/syntax errors.

tasks.label: BuddyBot: Build S9 App
tasks.detail: Builds the Android APK for the Samsung S9.

tasks.label: BuddyBot: Live Logcat (S9)
tasks.detail: Streams real-time logs from the S9 to your VS Code terminal.
